usage: floorPlan [-help] [-adjustToSite] [-coreMarginsBy {io die}] [-dieSizeByIoHeight {min max}] [-flip {n s f}] [-fplanOrigin {center llcorner}] [-noResize] [-noSnapToGrid] [-overlapSameSiteRow] {-b <die_box io_box core_box> | -s <W H Left Bottom Right Top> | -d <W H Left Bottom Right Top> | -r <aspectRatio [rowDensity [Left Bottom Right Top]]> | -su <aspectRatio [stdCellDensity [Left Bottom Right Top]]> | -keepShape <util>} [-site <site> | -siteOnly <site>]

options.name: -adjustToSite
options.description: floorplan boxes is multiple times of io site or core site's width

options.name: -coreMarginsBy
options.description: core margin to io or die

options.name: -d
options.description: by DIE size and core to edge

options.name: -dieSizeByIoHeight
options.description: use max or min io height for inital die size

options.name: -fplanOrigin
options.description: set fplan origin at center or lower left

options.name: -noResize
options.description: check if need do floorplan if everthing is same

options.name: -noSnapToGrid
options.description: do not change input floorplan boxes

options.name: -r
options.description: <aspectRatio [rowDensity [Left Bottom Right Top]]> by aspectRatio, density and core to edge

options.name: -s
options.description: by core size and core to edge

options.name: -siteOnly
options.description: default tech site name, only create row for the site ((site), optional)

options.name: -su
options.description: <aspectRatio [stdCellDensity [Left Bottom Right Top]]> by aspectRatio, density and core to edge
